PRD Acceptance Criteria
CriterionStatus
Admin sees a list of all logbooks in a table with columns: Name, Description, Plant, Facility, Created By, Last Updated.pass
Typing in the search bar filters the list by logbook name in real time.pass
Dropdown filters for Plant and Facility are available and functional.pass
Clicking 'Create new logbook' opens a modal where the admin can input Name, Description, Plant, and Facility.pass
Each logbook row has a 3-dot menu with options: View log history, Edit & configure, Pin, and Delete.pass
All fields in the logbook creation modal are mandatory, and errors are shown for empty/invalid inputs.pass
Pinned logbooks are visually highlighted and shown before the logbook name.pass
If no logbooks exist or no results match the search/filter, show a clean empty state message.pass
Admin is redirected to the configuration screen immediately after successful creation of a logbook.pass
Admin can add multiple fields from the right panel (text, checklist, dropdown, long text, attachments, table).pass
Admin clicks the Preview button to view the logbook layout as it would appear to users.pass
User can filter the list of past logbooks by date, shift, and logged by.pass
Entire row in the listing of past logs is clickable and redirects to the selected logbook.pass
Admin can access the 'Generate Report' popup from the logbook 3 dot menu and selecting 'Report generation settings'.fail
If no recipients are selected, display: 'Please select at least one recipient.'pass
